action_boundary: Should refund request RF-3 be released to the customer wallet?
communication_boundary: Use the remaining-balance ledger and prior credits. The original charge does not by itself support a later refund amount.

documents.text: Refund request RF-3 asks to issue USD 312 to customer wallet W-3.
Original charge CHG-3 for the order was USD 975.
Prior customer credits for the order total USD 640.
Remaining refundable balance for the order is USD 335 after prior credits.
Refund execution requires the requested amount to be no greater than the remaining refundable balance after prior credits.
